title: <div>  •  The Executioner’s Redemption → Must willingly accept exile to remove t
content:
• The Executioner’s Redemption → Must willingly accept exile to remove their title.
• The Exiled Monarch’s Coronation → If they can gather three players to swear fealty, they can purge their role.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ties purging into thematic storytelling moments.
✔ Encourages players to think long-term and strategize their exit.
✔ Creates dramatic tension by making purge attempts rare and risky.

📜 3. Rituals Are Public & Require Witnesses

📜 All transformations, purges, and major character alterations must happen openly before the class.

✔ How Public Rituals Work:
• Transformations are announced and witnessed.
• Other players may intervene, challenge, or attempt to block a ritual.
• If a player challenges a ritual and fails, they suffer a penalty.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 529 (chunk 529/555)
